name: Red, White, and Blue Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. First layer: Mix 2 packages red raspberry Jello with 2 cups hot water and 2 cups cold water. Chill and set.
2. Second layer: Heat 1 cup Half & Half and 1 cup sugar. Dissolve 1 package Knox Gelatin in 1 cup cold water and 1 teaspoon vanilla. Pour the two mixtures into a blender and add one (8 ounce) package cream cheese. Blend until smooth. Cool, then pour over the first layer.
3. Third layer: Mix 1 package black raspberry Jello with 1 cup hot water and 1 can drained blueberries.
